reason: Implemented scoped read-only Codex Desktop visibility and source-aware Telegram/Mini App/API controls. Production Desktop Resume/Stop/New Task remain honestly unsupported because stable Desktop control contracts were not proven.

findings.detail: `pnpm happytg doctor` exits 0 with WARN after using the local ignored `.env` and non-conflicting port overrides. Warnings remain for Codex websocket fallback and public Caddy Mini App route identity.
`pnpm happytg verify` exits 0 with WARN after using the local ignored `.env` and non-conflicting port overrides. Warnings remain for Codex smoke timeout and public Caddy Mini App route identity.
No stable Desktop/API-safe Resume contract was proven; production Resume remains unsupported.
No stable session-to-process/control handle was proven; Stop remains unsupported and no process-kill workaround was implemented.
No stable Desktop task creation contract was proven; New Desktop Task remains unsupported.
